name: Custom Menu Links
overview: Manage custom Jellyfin Web side menu links from the dashboard
description: Provides a simple dashboard UI for adding, editing, and reordering custom side menu links in Jellyfin Web. Changes are written to the web client config.json automatically.

name: Custom Login Buttons
overview: Add sign-up and custom forgot-password buttons to the Jellyfin login page
description: Configure a sign-up button and replace the default forgot-password button with a custom URL. Ideal for jfa-go and similar account management tools.

name: Account Portal
overview: Open signup and email password reset for Jellyfin
description: Enable self-service account registration with auto-enabled users and email-based password reset links on the login page.
